INC-001.text: Incident INC-001: Xid 43 on 172.31.15.220-4 (GPU stopped processing). Triage.
DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP 61C; DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE 410W->105W; DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL 100%->25% (util+power collapse at fault).
7 of 8 GPUs on 172.31.15.220 faulted; 882 GPUs across 141 nodes fired Xid in the same 3-min window — cluster-wide correlated failure.
Prior cluster-wide Xid bursts traced to a shared NCCL/network or power-domain fault — not per-GPU hardware.

INC-001.summary: Xid 43 (GPU stopped processing) on 172.31.15.220-4; part of a 882-GPU correlated cascade across 141 nodes. Peak 61C.
INC-001.action: Escalate to datacenter ops — shared-cause event (882 GPUs); inspect network fabric + power/cooling domain before touching individual GPUs.
